isi.lyrics:
Lyric XngHan&Xoul - Glow

Romanization

Yes all the rizz
geurae ige baro neomanui bit
Like yes, going out tonight
momi ganeun daero geochimeopsi
ttwieodeureo Let it out

Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
ne yeope du nun tteugo kkuneun kkum
numbusyeo siseon kkeute meomun chum
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Dance all night ginggimbameul kkaewo
Next to mine saebyeogeul derigo wa
Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Drip that glow
let me taste that taste that
Drip that glow
nae balkkeutkkaji
Drip that glow
let me taste that taste that

Wait nae ane
han chi api boiji aneul ttae
I say neol manna bitna
hemaeida boni dochakhan
igosi nareul bakhyeojwo

eodiseodeun chumeul chumyeon mwo eottae
modu neoreul chyeodabwado ne gyeoten I got ya
deureoogo sipeodo mot ganeun Your zone
yuilhage heorakdoen geon nappuniya
Hi there I’m here
glowing next to you

Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
ne yeope du nun tteugo kkuneun kkum
numbusyeo siseon kkeute meomun chum
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Dance all night ginggimbameul kkaewo
Next to mine saebyeogeul derigo wa
Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Drip that glow
let me taste that taste that
Drip that glow
nae balkkeutkkaji
Drip that glow
let me taste that taste that

Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
ne yeope du nun tteugo kkuneun kkum
numbusyeo siseon kkeute meomun chum
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Dance all night ginggimbameul kkaewo
Next to mine saebyeogeul derigo wa
Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Hangeul

Yes all the rizz
그래 이게 바로 너만의 빛
Like yes, going out tonight
몸이 가는 대로 거침없이
뛰어들어 Let it out

Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
네 옆에 두 눈 뜨고 꾸는 꿈
눈부셔 시선 끝에 머문 춤
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Dance all night 긴긴밤을 깨워
Next to mine 새벽을 데리고 와
Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Drip that glow
let me taste that taste that
Drip that glow
내 발끝까지
Drip that glow
let me taste that taste that

Wait 내 안에
한 치 앞이 보이지 않을 때
I say 널 만나 빛나
헤매이다 보니 도착한
이곳이 나를 밝혀줘

어디서든 춤을 추면 뭐 어때
모두 너를 쳐다봐도 네 곁엔 I got ya
들어오고 싶어도 못 가는 Your zone
유일하게 허락된 건 나뿐이야
Hi there I’m here
glowing next to you

Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
네 옆에 두 눈 뜨고 꾸는 꿈
눈부셔 시선 끝에 머문 춤
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Dance all night 긴긴밤을 깨워
Next to mine 새벽을 데리고 와
Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Drip that glow
let me taste that taste that
Drip that glow
내 발끝까지
Drip that glow
let me taste that taste that

Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
네 옆에 두 눈 뜨고 꾸는 꿈
눈부셔 시선 끝에 머문 춤
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning

Dance all night 긴긴밤을 깨워
Next to mine 새벽을 데리고 와
Look at you got your glow back,
didn’t you?
Come and give me that feeling
Give my life a new meaning
